data.title: Abu Dhabi Sovereign Wealth Fund Stockpiles $436 Million in BlackRock Bitcoin ETF Shares
data.description:

data.title: Torrent Capital Expands Cryptocurrency Portfolio With Additional SOL Purchase
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Canadian firm Torrent Capital Ltd. has announced an expansion of its cryptocurrency portfolio. Since the initial announcement on January 6, 2025, regarding the creation of a cryptocurrency investment portfolio and the first purchase of SOL, the company has acquired an additional 4,955 SOL tokens.

As of February 10, 2025, Torrent Capital holds a total of 6,955 SOL...
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/20302658527929?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Dell To Supply $5 Billion AI Servers To Musk's xAI
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Dell is set to provide AI servers worth $5 billion to Elon Musk's xAI. These servers will be equipped with Nvidia GB200 GPUs and are expected to be delivered within 2025. Following this announcement, Dell's stock price rose by 4%. Last December, xAI secured $6 billion in funding, with a portion allocated for GPU purchases.

data.description:
